message:
fix: drop arrow bindings to prevent layout shift on click in Excalidraw

Excalidraw recalculates elbowed arrow routes on any interaction, causing
visible shifts when our Graphviz-computed routes disagree with its router.
Fix by making arrows static polylines (no bindings, elbowed=false) since
the code is the source of truth, not the canvas.

- Set startBinding/endBinding to null on all arrows
- Store from/to in customData._from/_to for fromFile() round-trip
- Fallback routing uses edge-to-edge orthogonal paths instead of
  center-to-center straight lines
